_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide input to post mission planning.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and evaluating prompt engineering strategies, including few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought prompting, and structured output generation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-S-009 (DG, cosine: 0.413), OP-T-004 (OP, cosine: 0.390).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.2/10 (raw 0.224). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [input, mission, planning, post, provide] vs WIDAI-only terms [chain, designing, engineering, evaluating, few, generation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.859 (P=0.872, R=0.846). P exceeds R by 0.026 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (87.9%). "Provide input to post mission planning." and "Skill in designing and evaluating prompt engineering strategies, including few-s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.425 > STS 0.224 (gap +0.201). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [input, mission, planning, post, provide]. WIDAI terms: [chain, designing, engineering, evaluating, few, generation].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.201 with low STS 0.224. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
